positive: A minimalist, celestial forest scene printed on a cream-colored canvas. The main subject is a glowing, stylized grove of bioluminescent trees with abstract, geometric leaf patterns. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, featuring strong contrast between deep midnight blues, ethereal aquamarine glows, and pops of neon violet. The art style should be a blend of Nordic folk art and vaporwave aesthetics, utilizing clean, graphic silhouettes and negative space. Focus on perfect symmetry and crisp edges, suitable for large format apparel printing. Ultra detailed, high contrast, vector-like precision.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, noise, grainy, low contrast, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, logo, trademark, copyrighted characters, artist names, poorly rendered, duplicate elements
